ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "date_notified" TEXT /* Date the case was notified */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the individual */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DHB where the case was reported */,
  "overseas_travel" INTEGER /* Whether the individual traveled overseas */,
  "last_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the last country visited before return (if applicable) */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight (if applicable) */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case (e.g., confirmed, suspected, recovered, deceased) */,
  "symptoms_onset_date" TEXT /* Date when symptoms first appeared */,
  "hospitalization_date" TEXT /* Date of hospitalization, if applicable */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge from hospital, if applicable */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Final outcome of the case (e.g., recovered, deceased) */,
  "quarantine_status" INTEGER /* Whether the individual is currently in quarantine */,
  "quarantine_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of quarantine */,
  "quarantine_end_date" TEXT /* End date of quarantine */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the individual */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination, if applicable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the case record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the case record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the case record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the case record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_last_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES dhbs ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dhbs" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DHB */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the DHB */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the DHB is located */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the DHB */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region served by the DHB */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the DHB record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the DHB record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the DHB record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the DHB record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 20 to 29) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the country record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the country record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of flight departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of flight arrival */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the flight departed */,
  "departure_city" TEXT /* City of flight departure */,
  "arrival_city" TEXT /* City of flight arrival */,
  "airline" TEXT /* Name of the airline operating the flight */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the flight record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the flight record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the flight record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the flight record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, administrator, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., public health official, administrator, researcher) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
